pinyin: Nóngchǎng lǐ yǎng le gè zhǒng shēngchù.
english: The farm raises all kinds of livestock.

sentence: 他患有慢性胃病，每天要按时吃药。
pinyin: Tā huàn yǒu màn xìng wèibìng, měitiān yào ànshí chī yào.
english: He has a chronic stomach condition and needs to take medicine on time every day.

sentence: 元宵节家家户户挂起了灯笼。
pinyin: Yuánxiāo jié jiājiā-hùhù guà qǐ le dēnglóng.
english: Every household hung up lanterns for the Lantern Festival.

pinyin: Tā qiánchéng de zài miào lǐ qídǎo.
english: She prayed devoutly at the temple.

sentence: 我的电脑硬盘快满了，要清理一下。
pinyin: Wǒ de diànnǎo yìngpán kuài mǎn le, yào qīnglǐ yīxià.
english: My computer's hard disk is almost full — I need to clean it up.
